headline: Asia’s Largest Oil Buyers Running Low on Hormuz Alternatives
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Asia’s largest oil buyers have been able to lean on workarounds to limit the impact of more than seven weeks of war in the Persian Gulf, shielding not only their own economies but those of neighbors competing for cargoes.
